title: Illinois Tool Works 2025 Annual Report
note: Primary source for ITW's business description, segment structure, revenue, margins, employees, countries, patents, and Food Equipment and Welding segment descriptions.

title: ITW Food Equipment Group Sustainability
note: Documents ITW food equipment brands, ENERGY STAR positioning, Hobart, and examples such as Advansys energy and water savings.

title: Miller 2025 Full Line Catalog
note: Product catalog reference for Miller welding equipment, PPE, filler metals, and related ITW Welding products.

title: Illinois Tool Works Ratios and Metrics
note: Market data source for current market capitalization and P/E ratio used in input metrics.

title: Open Source Welder
note: Open-source project reference for a welder as a local fabrication alternative, with maturity caveat.

title: Bakery Oven
note: Open-source project reference for a bakery oven in the food equipment space, with maturity caveat.

title: Global Village Construction Set Machine Index
note: Documents Open Source Ecology's broader open machinery portfolio, including fabrication and production tools relevant to decentralized manufacturing.

title: Open Source Kitchen Construction Set
note: Reference for open kitchen appliance concepts and the limits of current maturity in commercial kitchen replacements.

title: OpenPnP - Open Source SMT Pick and Place
note: Open-source electronics manufacturing toolchain relevant to local production and repair of controllers for fabrication equipment.

title: Open Source Hardware Definition
note: Defines the open hardware model used to assess whether physical alternatives are meaningfully open and reproducible.
